title: Karnataka 2nd PUC Results 2026: KSEAB PUC 12th results declared at karresults.nic.in, girls outperform boys
description: Karnataka 2nd PUC result 2026 highlights: KSEAB PUC 2 results announced today, April 9, 2026. Follow the blog for latest updates on results, direct link, how to check and more.
